query:
INSERT INTO product_images (productId, imageUrl, imageKey, sortOrder, isPrimary, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/VHcLHnSaqieNVPny.png', 'armchair-01.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'AC-001-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/bdvJZNmUhABGJEmx.png', 'armchair-02.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'AC-002-YEL'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/qzHGmscaOCRthmXG.png', 'armchair-03.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'AC-003-CRM'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/fHilgaCADNPkjlaT.png', 'armchair-04.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'AC-004-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/cCGKQasLaJhCkbqt.png', 'armchair-05.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'AC-005-EMR';
